mapper.insert:
select rag_doc_seq.nextval from dual
insert into rag_documents ( rag_doc_seq, source_type, source_seq, file_name, file_ext, raw_text, extract_status, created_at )
values ( #{rag_doc_seq}, #{source_type}, #{source_seq} , #{file_name}, #{file_ext}, #{raw_text}, 'DONE', sysdate )

select chunk_seq.nextval from dual
insert into rag_chunks ( chunk_seq, rag_doc_seq, chunk_index, chunk_text, embed_status, created_at )
values ( #{chunk_seq}, #{rag_doc_seq},#{chunk_index}, #{chunk_text}, 'PENDING', sysdate )
mapper.select: select chunk_seq, rag_doc_seq, chunk_text from rag_chunks order by chunk_seq
